rule.name: Suspicious OpenSSH Daemon Error
rule.description: Detects suspicious SSH / SSHD error messages that indicate a fatal or suspicious error that could be caused by exploiting attempts
rule.query:
{
  "keywords": [
    "unexpected internal error",
    "unknown or unsupported key type",
    "invalid certificate signing key",
    "invalid elliptic curve value",
    "incorrect signature",
    "error in libcrypto",
    "unexpected bytes remain after decoding",
    "fatal: buffer_get_string: bad string",
    "Local: crc32 compensation attack",
    "bad client public DH value",
    "Corrupted MAC on input"
  ],
  "condition": "keywords"
}
